What I Do

Performance Marketing
Built to Scale.

Every engagement starts with a diagnosis — not assumptions. Here's how I help DTC brands grow profitably.

⚡
Meta Ads
Full-funnel campaign architecture — cold traffic creative testing, warm retargeting pools, and lookalike audiences seeded from real purchase data. Creative strategy included. I don't just run ads. I build systems that compound.
🎵
TikTok Ads
Short-form video ads built around the actual buyer, not the obvious one. Creative angle testing, hook optimisation, and audience structure that makes TikTok work as a true performance channel.
🔍
Google Ads
Search campaigns that capture the demand your social ads create. High-intent buyers who already know what they want — I make sure they find you, not your competitor.
🔬
Account Audits
Audience-creative alignment, creative angle diversity, attribution methodology, budget allocation. I find what's leaking money and fix it before we scale. Free for new clients.
🎯
Creative Strategy
I direct the creative — angles, hooks, scripts, and UGC briefs. The ad creative is the most important variable in your ROAS. Most brands get this wrong. I fix it.
Case Study

PKR 9M In.
PKR 42.04M Out.

ZamZam Perfumes · DTC Perfume · Pakistan · Nov 2025 – Present

to the store
8.91x
Meta reported ROAS
8 months
Still live
& scaling
Meta Ads — PKR 8.57M
Built full-funnel architecture from day one. Cold traffic tested multiple angles. Warm retargeting from video viewers and Instagram engagers. Best campaign: 12.87x ROAS. Account blended: 8.91x reported ROAS.
TikTok Ads — ~$1,000 USD
Tested as a supplementary channel on minimal budget. Top campaigns delivered 27.48x and 23.54x ROAS — proving the creative-first approach works across platforms.
Google Ads — PKR 205K
Search campaigns captured high-intent buyers and generated PKR 2.73M in revenue at PKR 849 cost per conversion — closing demand that social ads created.
The Problem We Solved
ZamZam Perfumes launched on Shopify in November 2025 with zero paid ads infrastructure. We built the entire system from scratch and reported results verified against real delivered revenue.
The Attribution Methodology — Why This Matters
8.91x
Meta reported ROAS
→
4.64x
Real delivered ROAS
(Shopify verified)
Meta reported 8.91x ROAS. Most agencies would call that the result and send an invoice.

I didn't. Every month, I cross-referenced reported revenue against Shopify's actual fulfilment data — removing COD cancellations and undelivered parcels. Real delivered ROAS: 4.64x.

Lower than the platform number. More honest than what most agencies will ever tell you. That's the standard I hold every campaign to.
How I Work

No Guesswork.
No Vanity Metrics.

A structured 4-step process from audit to scale — built to compound over time, not spike and fade.

01
Audit
Before anything goes live, I audit your existing setup. Audience-creative alignment, attribution methodology, creative angle diversity, budget structure. Free for new clients.
02
Strategy
I build a campaign strategy from the actual buyer up — not the assumed one. Audience architecture, creative angles, platform mix, and a 30-day launch plan built to compound.
03
Launch
Full campaign build and launch. I handle everything — ad account structure, creative direction, copy, targeting, pixel verification, and budget allocation.
04
Scale
Weekly optimisation. Creative rotation before fatigue hits. Results reported against real fulfilment data every month — not just what the platform says.
Why TheVisionix

I Report What
Actually Happened.

I'm Rahim — founder of TheVisionix and a performance marketer specialising in Meta, TikTok, and Google Ads for DTC and ecommerce brands.

I built TheVisionix around one principle: report what actually happened, not what the platform wants you to believe.

Most agencies hand you a ROAS number from Meta's dashboard and call it a result. I cross-reference every campaign against actual Shopify fulfilment data — accounting for COD cancellations and undelivered parcels — to give you a number that reflects real delivered revenue.

That methodology is why my clients in Pakistan and the UK trust the numbers I report. And it's what separates a performance partner from a campaign manager.
